title: Top QA Interview Questions
summary: Top QA interview questions covering testing fundamentals and real-world scenarios.

title: Top Selenium Interview Questions
summary: Frequently asked Selenium automation interview questions.

content.heading: What is Selenium?
content.body: Selenium is an open-source automation testing tool used for web application testing.

content.heading: What are the components of Selenium Suite?
content.body: Selenium IDE, Selenium RC (deprecated), Selenium WebDriver, and Selenium Grid.

content.heading: What is WebDriver?
content.body: WebDriver is an API that interacts directly with browsers for automation.

content.heading: What is Selenium Grid?
content.body: Selenium Grid enables parallel execution across multiple browsers and machines.

content.heading: How do you handle dropdowns in Selenium?
content.body: Using the Select class and its methods such as selectByVisibleText().

title: Top Playwright Interview Questions
summary: Latest Playwright interview questions covering locators, fixtures, and frameworks.

content.heading: What is Playwright?
content.body: Playwright is a modern browser automation framework developed by Microsoft.

content.heading: Which browsers are supported by Playwright?
content.body: Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

content.heading: What are Playwright locators?
content.body: Locators are recommended methods for finding elements reliably.

content.heading: What is auto-waiting in Playwright?
content.body: Playwright automatically waits for elements to become actionable.

content.heading: How is Playwright better than Selenium?
content.body: Playwright offers built-in waiting, multiple browser support, and faster execution.

title: Top API Testing Interview Questions
summary: REST API testing interview questions with practical examples.

content.heading: What is API Testing?
content.body: API Testing validates functionality, reliability, performance, and security of APIs.

content.heading: What is REST API?
content.body: REST is an architectural style that uses HTTP methods for communication.

content.heading: What are common HTTP methods?
content.body: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.

content.heading: What is a 404 status code?
content.body: It indicates that the requested resource was not found.

content.heading: Which tools are used for API testing?
content.body: Postman, Rest Assured, SoapUI, and JMeter.

title: Top SQL Interview Questions
summary: Essential SQL interview questions for testers, analysts, and developers.

content.heading: What is SQL?
content.body: SQL is a language used to manage and query relational databases.

content.heading: Difference between WHERE and HAVING?
content.body: WHERE filters rows before grouping; HAVING filters groups after aggregation.

content.heading: What is a Primary Key?
content.body: A column that uniquely identifies each record in a table.

content.heading: What is a JOIN?
content.body: JOIN combines rows from two or more tables based on related columns.

content.heading: Difference between INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN?
content.body: INNER JOIN returns matching rows; LEFT JOIN returns all left table rows and matching right table rows.

title: Top Manual Testing Interview Questions
summary: Covers STLC, SDLC, defect lifecycle, and testing methodologies.

content.heading: What is Manual Testing?
content.body: Manual Testing involves executing test cases without automation tools.

content.heading: What is STLC?
content.body: Software Testing Life Cycle.

content.heading: What is Defect Life Cycle?
content.body: The stages through which a defect passes from identification to closure.

content.heading: What is Severity and Priority?
content.body: Severity measures impact; Priority determines urgency of fixing.

content.heading: What is Regression Testing?
content.body: Testing to ensure recent changes haven't affected existing functionality.

title: Top ENOVIA Interview Questions
summary: Important ENOVIA interview questions for PLM professionals.

content.heading: What is ENOVIA?
content.body: ENOVIA is Dassault Systèmes' PLM solution for product lifecycle management.

content.heading: What is a Collaborative Space?
content.body: A secure workspace for managing products, documents, and processes.

content.heading: What is Change Action?
content.body: A process used to manage product changes and approvals.

content.heading: What is Engineering Release?
content.body: It manages product maturity and release processes.

content.heading: What is Bookmark Structure?
content.body: A method for organizing and navigating PLM content.

title: Top 3DEXPERIENCE Interview Questions
summary: Common 3DEXPERIENCE platform interview questions.

title: Top Business Analyst Interview Questions
summary: Requirement gathering, stakeholder management, and BA interview questions.

content.heading: What is a User Story?
content.body: A short requirement written from the user's perspective.

content.heading: What is BRD?
content.body: Business Requirement Document.

content.heading: What is FRD?
content.body: Functional Requirement Document.

content.heading: How do you prioritize requirements?
content.body: Using techniques such as MoSCoW or business value analysis.
